product_overview: SkillBridge is an AI-powered web app that generates structured learning roadmaps from user goals, provides node-level study tools (resources, notes, quizzes, AI tutor), and tracks progress with XP, streaks, and badges. It supports project persistence, public sharing of roadmaps, and contextual chat tutoring.
core_goals: Enable users to generate practical, ordered learning roadmaps from natural language goals using AI.
Provide an interactive workspace to consume resources, take quizzes, chat with an AI tutor, and persist progress per project/roadmap.
Track learner momentum through XP, levels, streaks, learning minutes, and quiz completion; support public sharing/export of roadmaps.
Secure user data with JWT auth and protect resource modification endpoints while allowing safe public read access for shared roadmaps.

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User registration, login, session validation, and password reset flows using JWT-based auth.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid email and password -> Receive 201 with JWT token and user id -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with current user profile (id, email, stats)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with profile
POST /api/auth/register with existing email -> Receive 409 Conflict with error message
POST /api/auth/login with invalid password -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message

POST /api/auth/forgot-password with registered email -> Receive 200 indicating reset email queued -> POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid reset token and new password -> Receive 200 password reset confirmation
POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid/expired token -> Receive 400 Bad Request indicating invalid token

features.name: Project Management API
features.description: Create, list, retrieve, update and delete user learning projects (project is the container for roadmaps).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/project with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { name, description } -> Receive 201 with created project { id } -> GET /api/project with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 list including created project -> GET /api/project/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 project details -> PUT /api/project/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { name } -> Receive 200 updated project -> DELETE /api/project/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 204 No Content
POST /api/project without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/project/:id with a valid JWT belonging to different user -> Receive 403 Forbidden (authorization enforcement)
PUT /api/project/:id with malformed body (missing name) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error

features.name: Roadmap API
features.description: Generate roadmaps via AI, save generated roadmaps into projects, fetch & update roadmaps, toggle public visibility, and fetch public roadmaps by share id.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/roadmap/generate with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { goal, skillLevel, timeIntensity, style } -> Receive 200 with generated roadmap JSON (nodes, edges, metadata)
POST /api/roadmap with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { projectId, roadmap } -> Receive 201 with saved roadmap id
GET /api/roadmap/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with roadmap content
PUT /api/roadmap/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { nodes/edges/metadata } -> Receive 200 updated roadmap

PATCH /api/roadmap/:id/public with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { isPublic: true } -> Receive 200 with updated visibility -> GET /api/roadmap/public/:id without auth -> Receive 200 public roadmap details
POST /api/roadmap/generate with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and a prompt requesting disallowed/illegal content -> Receive 400 Bad Request (rejected by content rules)
POST /api/roadmap with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> but missing projectId -> Receive 400 Bad Request validation error
GET /api/roadmap/:id with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> when user is not authorized for private roadmap -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Quiz API
features.description: Generate and grade quizzes per roadmap node; persist quiz results and allow retrieval of past results.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/quiz/generate with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { roadmapId, nodeId } -> Receive 200 with 5 multiple-choice questions (4 options each, metadata includes timer and cache key)

POST /api/quiz/submit with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { roadmapId, nodeId, answers, startedAt } -> Receive 200 with grading { score, passed: true/false, correctAnswers } -> GET /api/quiz/result/:roadmapId/:nodeId/:userId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 persisted QuizResult
POST /api/quiz/generate without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/quiz/submit with answers after 5-minute timer expired -> Receive 408 Request Timeout or 400 indicating quiz timed out and is not graded
GET /api/quiz/result/:roadmapId/:nodeId/:otherUserId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> when requester is not permitted -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: AI Chat Tutor API
features.description: Project-scoped contextual chat with an AI tutor; persist chat history and support retrieval per project.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/chat with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { projectId, message, optional nodeId } -> Receive 200 with AI response object and message id (response persisted)
GET /api/chat/:projectId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 chat history array for project
POST /api/chat with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body missing projectId -> Receive 400 Bad Request
POST /api/chat with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and message flagged by content rules -> Receive 400 Bad Request (rejected by policy)
GET /api/chat/:projectId without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Profile API
features.description: Read user profile and stats (XP, streaks, learning minutes) and update streak, add learning time, and award XP.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/profile/:userId with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with profile { xp, level, streak, longestStreak, learningMinutes, quizStats }
POST /api/profile/:userId/update-streak with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with updated streak value
POST /api/profile/:userId/add-learning-time with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { minutes } -> Receive 200 with updated learningMinutes
POST /api/profile/:userId/add-xp with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body { xp } -> Receive 200 with updated XP and possible level-up metadata
POST /api/profile/:otherUserId/add-xp with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> when requester is not authorized to mutate that user's profile -> Receive 403 Forbidden
POST /api/profile/:userId/add-xp with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and negative xp value -> Receive 400 Bad Request (validation)

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User registration, login, and password management

features.name: Project Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for user learning projects

endpoints.description: Save a generated roadmap to project
Generate quiz questions for a node
